title: Advanced Architectures Path
description: Build fluency in Advanced Architectures inside Representation Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: EMA Swapping
steps.summary: EMA Swapping belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Representation Learning / Advanced Architectures. Compare it with Twins-SVT and shared projections. It opens into Checkpoint Averaging / EMA Swapping.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Dummy Variable
steps.summary: Dummy Variable belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Representation Learning / Advanced Architectures. Compare it with Predictor Variable and Interval Variable. It opens into Dummy Variable Regression.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Indicator Variable
steps.summary: Indicator Variable belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Representation Learning / Advanced Architectures. Start after Indicator Functions in Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Twins-SVT
steps.summary: Twins-SVT belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Representation Learning / Advanced Architectures. Compare it with shared projections and Predictor Variable.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Count Variable
steps.summary: Count Variable belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Representation Learning / Advanced Architectures. Compare it with Predictor Variable and Interval Variable.

steps.title: Interval Variable
steps.summary: Interval Variable belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Representation Learning / Advanced Architectures. Compare it with Predictor Variable and Indicator Variable.
